'''Ryn''' [[Language/Legends|language]] was the native language of the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It used tones and inflections and was easily described as melodious by anyone who heard it.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Since childhood, Ryns were taught both Ryn language and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], to get more easily integrated into the galactic society, although they were usually only literate in their own language.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
